select_when: The task can be decomposed into repeatable steps with clear handoffs, inputs, and output quality checks.
Consistency, auditability, or scale matter more than improvisation because many people or systems must execute the same logic reliably.
A process needs explicit branching rules, bounded edge cases, and coordination across specialized components.
The problem is becoming noisy because the team lacks a shared procedure for how work should move from input to checked output.
avoid_when: Novelty, ambiguity, or human emotion is doing most of the causal work and a rigid procedure is being mistaken for actual understanding.
Rules are being optimized to visible proxies while exceptions, tacit knowledge, or changing context are treated as noise.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on repeatable logic, branching rules, and auditability rather than on AI-prompting sprawl.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor automation overlays because the raw source is already strong on repeatable steps, branching, and trustworthy execution structure.
Did not add higher-order fields because this batch stays inside the frozen Wave 1 to Wave 3 contracts.
open_questions: The typed labels compress a source that spans operational procedure, multi-agent coordination, and trust-building through consistency.

select_when.note: The raw source is explicit that algorithmic thinking is strongest when work can be decomposed into repeatable, auditable steps with bounded branching.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions are directly supported by the source danger lines on rigid procedure in novel contexts and proxy optimization.

input_type.note: The raw source activates on procedural design and coordination problems, but the compact input label is reviewed operational normalization.

output_type.note: The source produces reliable procedure structure and branching discipline; the output label compresses that into a typed artifact.

reasoning_types.note: Algorithmic thinking is clearly deductive and systems-oriented in use, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
